obverse.description:
Narrow crowned and armored portrait of King Christian IV over a line. Shield with arms of Denmark below the line. King's portrait is within a beaded line cut below by the shield. Legend is outside the circle, along the rim. King's motto is within the circle along the border.
King's hair does not fall over the collar. There are 10 Hearts in Denmark arms
obverse.lettering_translation:
King Christian the Fourth, King of Denmark and Norway, the Goths and the Wends
Piety strengthens the realms
obverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück and Lübke & Wiedemann KG, Leonberg

reverse.description: Nude female figure, representing Fortuna, is standing tall on a small globe with hair flowing left. She helds a long flying banner with right hand above head keeping it at hip size with the left. Fortuna is quite totally within a beaded circle with legend outside. Date and mintmark are at end of legend
reverse.lettering_translation: New coin of the city of Gluckstadt
reverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück and Lübke & Wiedemann KG, Leonberg
